KIND:     ConfigMap
VERSION:  v1

DESCRIPTION:
     ConfigMap holds configuration data for pods to consume.

FIELDS:
   apiVersion	<string>
   binaryData	<map[string]string>
   data	<map[string]string>
   immutable	<boolean>
   kind	<string>
   metadata	<Object>
      annotations	<map[string]string>
      creationTimestamp	<string>
      labels	<map[string]string>
      name	<string>
      namespace	<string>
